text: Mail completed form to: W. D. Boyce Council
Payment must be received to reserve
RESERVATIONS MUST BE MADE 7 DAYS PRIOR TO EVENT IN ORDER TO BE APPROVED.
Arrival Date: Time: Departure Date: Time:
Expected Attendance Men: Women: Boys: Girls:
Dining Hall Archery Range**   North Ridge
Wilderness Training Ctr Rifle Range**   Gunflint 
Tent Camping COPE Course***   South Ridge
Canoe Six-Pack Rental 1 2 (located at the North Ridge Parking Lot)  
Enter any additional equipment, activity or area requests here:
* Use of Aquatics facilities (Waterfront, and/or watercraft) – Our group shall be responsible for providing qualified supervision and lifeguard(s) and
shall conduct ourselves in a safe and prudent manner as per the Guide to Safe Scouting.
**Use of shooting facilities (Archery, Rifle, and Shotgun Ranges) – Our group shall be responsible for providing qualified and authorized
supervision, following the guidelines as directed in the Guide to Safe Scouting and shall conduct ourselves in a safe and prudent manner. For
questions and clarifications on current guidelines contact Peoria Scout Service Center.
***Must be approved by the Council C.O.P.E. committee prior to application for usage, see other notes on camp fee sheet and climbing weekend
I am familiar with the Camp facilities. We will be responsible for the facilities that we use and agree to reimburse the W. D. Boyce Council for
all reasonable costs and expenses incurred on account of any loss or damage to said facilities and/or equipment. I further hereby represent and
warrant that we shall furnish adequate and qualified adult leadership and supervision for each of the facilities our group has requested.
Entered into computer Total Fees Due: $_________________ 
In the event of a change in plans or the case of emergency, please notify Camp Ranger Jason Biggs: 309-338-4613
W. D. Boyce Council Boy Scouts of America
W. D. Boyce Council Program Fee Structure
Shotgun Building w/ Pavilion (16) $125 Weekend $200 Weekend
Director’s Cabin (4) with flush toilets/shower $85 Weekend $150 Weekend
Tent Camping No Fee $25 per Campsite
Med Station (in office annex) 2 bedrooms sleeps 7 $30 per Weekend $40 per Weekend
Buckskin Housing Units (4 beds per unit) 6 total units $3.50 per person $5 per person
Family Site Housing Units & Pavilion (4 beds per/7 units) $5.00 per person $7 per person
Family Site Exclusive Use (7 Units & Pavilion) $125.00 Weekend $145.00 Weekend
*Must use ISR provided equipment ISR Shooting Sports
Ingersoll Rifle or Shotgun Range $5 each/day for each rifle $10 each/day for each
Rifle or shotgun shells (includes targets and clay pigeons) Rifle - $5.00 per 100 Rifle - $7.00 per 100
Archery- Bows and Arrows Bows - $4.00 each Bows - $7.00 each
Lost Arrows - $2.00 ea Lost Arrows - $4.00 ea
ISR Canoes, Rowboats, or Kayaks on Lake Roberts $5 each/day $10 each/day
Canoes (6 pack of canoes on trailer). 3 pickup locations: $10 each/day
Utica, IL or Bloomington, IL or London Mills, IL
Fishing on Lake Roberts- no charge to Scout groups. State Licensing Laws apply; Creel Limits are posted and
Climbing Tower on scheduled climbing weekends $10 per climber $20 per climber
Climbing Tower with Staff $20 per climber $40 per climber
COPE Course w/ Staff - Minimum 10 participants $15 per participant $30 per participant
Human Foosball Court Free (w/ own ball) $10 (w/ own ball)
Mountain Bikes (Minimum 10 bikes) (12 bikes in stock) $100.00 per 10 bikes $120.00 per 10 bikes
GPS Units for Geocache (recommended 1 unit for 5-7 $10.00 per unit $15.00 per unit
Council Service Center Supplies- (Complimentary to Scout units with a reservation):
Leatherworking Kits- lost piece replacement costs do apply
Eagle Kit (Eagle Scout Court of Honor display)
